name: Roman to Integer
description: Given a Roman numeral string, convert it to an integer. Roman numerals use I=1, V=5, X=10, L=50, C=100, D=500, M=1000. When a smaller value appears before a larger value, it is subtracted (e.g., IV=4, IX=9).
constraints: s contains only characters I, V, X, L, C, D, M
